note: Curated H1B-sponsor heuristic. confidence=high: large, long-established sponsor with a sustained public H1B record. confidence=medium: likely sponsor with a smaller/shorter record. Matched by exact/alias name. NOT a guarantee that a given role is sponsored — always verify on MyVisaJobs / H1BGrader before applying.
